case_title: LESTER, CONSTANCE F. VS WOODSIDE, JASON A. MR. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LESTER, CONSTANCE F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODSIDE, JASON A. MR. THE INTERNATIONAL SPY SHOP $596.73 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $626.73 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY LESTER, CONSTANCE F. AS TO DEFENDANT WOODSIDE, JASON A. MR. THE INTERNATIONAL SPY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE INTERNATIONAL SPY SHOP
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSIDE, JASON A. MR. THE INTERNATIONAL SPY SHOP HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LESTER, CONSTANCE F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOODSIDE, JASON A. MR. THE INTERNATIONAL SPY SHOP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOODSIDE, JASON A. MR.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-08-2007, GRANTED
